name: Devilled Crab in Cucumber Cups.
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together and fill cucumber cups.
2. To make cucumber cups - Peel and cut cucumber crosswise approximately 3 inches thick, and scoop out seeds to make cups.
3. Prepare a marinade by mixing 1/2 cup white vinegar with 1/2 cup water, 1 tablespoon salt, and 1/4 cup sugar in a bowl.
4. Place the cucumber cups into the marinade and let them marinate for about half an hour.
5. Drain off and discard the liquid from the cucumbers.
6. Fill the prepared cucumber cups with the devilled crab mixture.
